revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{link|no}}}|yes |[[Japanese yen|¥]] |¥ }}{{formatnum:{{{1|}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{year|{{{2|0}}}}}}|0||{{#ifexpr:{{Inflation/JP/startyear}}<={{{year|{{{2|0}}}}}} and {{{year|{{{2|0}}}}}}<{{Inflation/year|JP}} | ({{#if:{{{about|}}} |equivalent to about ¥{{formatnum:{{Inflation|JP|{{formatnum:{{{1|}}}|R}}|{{{year|{{{2}}}}}}|r={{{round|0}}}}}}} |equivalent to ¥{{formatnum:{{Inflation|JP|{{formatnum:{{{1|}}}|R}}|{{{year|{{{2}}}}}}|r={{{round|{{#ifexpr:{{Inflation|JP|{{formatnum:{{{1|}}}|R}}|{{{year|{{{2}}}}}}}}>1000|0|2}}}}}}}}} }} in {{Inflation/year|JP}}) }}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
